## Summary

After approving the Story Ledger at the Review Gate, users were trapped in a redirect loop: the ledger page bounced them to the progress bar page, and navigating back to the ledger triggered the redirect again.

**Root cause:** Line 283 of `ledger/page.tsx` — when the job moves to `phase_2/running` after approval, `activelyRunning` becomes true and the page unconditionally redirects to the evaluate page. But the user should be able to view their approved ledger while Phase 2/3 runs.

**Fix:** Only redirect if the ledger was NOT approved (no accepted artifact exists and the job isn't marked as approved). When the ledger has been approved, the page stays viewable as a read-only approved state.

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/ledger/page.tsx` — redirect guard condition only

**Does NOT touch:**
- No pipeline logic, no approval flow, no progress bar
- The evaluate page (`page.tsx`) and poller are unchanged

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Edge case: if a job somehow reaches phase_2 without an approved ledger AND without the admin phase-skip flag, the old redirect behavior is preserved (redirect to progress page)
- Normal flow: approve → ledger stays viewable → user can navigate freely between ledger and progress page

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI redirect logic only, no pipeline changes.
